items.headline: Penguins hope to figure it out against Flyers in Game 3 of Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
PITTSBURGH -- On Sept. 18, when the Pittsburgh Penguins opened training camp, there was little expectation. At least, not externally.
One of the model NHL franchises of the modern era was meant to limp through the regular season to a fourth straight year without qualifying for the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats leaders for 2025-2026 season
items.description:
NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, we will identify the leaders in key advanced metrics.
\---

items.headline: Sean Couturier accepting redefined role to help Philadelphia take control of 1st round
items.description:
PITTSBURGH -- Rick Tocchet sat in Sean Couturier's seat once upon a time.
It was near the end of an 18-season NHL career that saw him score 440 goals in 1,144 games. He was a forward in his mid-30s that was a step or two slower than he had been

items.headline: Victor Hedman injury status update April 21 2026
items.description:
TAMPA -- Victor Hedman could return to the Tampa Bay Lightning in the Stanley Cup Playoffs, coach Jon Cooper said Tuesday, but it’s unlikely he will do so in the Eastern Conference First Round.
The defenseman and Lightning captain hasn't played since leaving during the first period of a 6-2

items.description: NHL.com identifies players to watch for free-to-play fantasy hockey games, props and futures throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. For more coverage, visit NHL.com/Fantasy.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild Matt Boldy mother serving up smiles during rise to NHL stardom
items.description: MANSFIELD, Mass. -- The building is dark and low-slung, the usual neon beer signs in its windows, the word open colored red, white and blue. The billboard-like sign advertises pizza and keno, Lunch, Dinner, and Late Night! Around the U-shaped bar sit a handful of regulars on this Thursday afternoon,

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers Jason Dickinson shines in long-awaited playoff return
items.description: EDMONTON -- Jason Dickinson had not played a game in the Stanley Cup Playoffs since 2020, and there was some doubt whether he would be available to the Edmonton Oilers for Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks.

items.headline: Dallas Stars raises level of play in Game 2 win against Wild
items.description: DALLAS -- The Dallas Stars showed up in the Stanley Cup Playoffs on Monday and won 4-2 against the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center to even the best-of-7 series 1-1.

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Edmonton Oilers Game 1 recap April 20 2026
items.description: EDMONTON -- Kasperi Kapanen scored his second goal of the game with 1:54 remaining in the third period, and the Edmonton Oilers rallied for a 4-3 win against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at Rogers Place on Monday.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild Dallas Stars game 2 recap April 20 2026
items.description: DALLAS -- Wyatt Johnston scored twice, and the Dallas Stars defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-2 in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center on Monday.

items.headline: Jordan Martinook redeems himself in 2OT for Hurricanes Game 2 win
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Jordan Martinook struggled for words to describe what he was feeling.
He had just scored the game-winning goal at 13:53 of the second overtime in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round to give the Carolina Hurricanes a 3-2 victory against the Ottawa Senators at Lenovo
